title: Elastic sleeve for a power conductor
abstract: Elastic sleeve (1) for electrically insulating a HV/MV power conductor in a power network, comprising a) a shrinkable or expandable elastic sleeve body (10); b) a receiving space (20) in the sleeve body, for receiving the power conductor; c) a cavity (30) formed in the sleeve body; and d) a divider assembly (40), arranged, at least partially, in the cavity and comprising a plurality of discrete impedance elements, operable as a voltage divider for sensing a voltage of an inner conductor of the power conductor.
claims:
Claims 1 . Elastic sleeve (1 , 2, 3, 4) for electrically insulating a HV/MV power conductor (210) in a power network, the elastic sleeve comprising a) an elastic sleeve body (10) for insulating the power conductor, the sleeve body being radially shrinkable around the power conductor or radially expandable when pushed over the power conductor; b) a receiving space (20), formed in the sleeve body, for receiving a section of the power conductor such that the sleeve body surrounds the power conductor; c) a cavity (30, 32), formed in the sleeve body, and delimited by a cavity wall (190, 290); and d) a divider assembly (40, 41 , 42, 43, 44), arranged, at least partially, in the cavity and comprising a plurality of discrete impedance elements (60), of which at least two of said impedance elements are electrically connected in series such as to be operable as a voltage divider for sensing a voltage of an inner conductor (250) of the power conductor. 2. Elastic sleeve according to claim 1 , wherein the plurality of discrete impedance elements (60) comprises one or more resistors, and/or one or more capacitors and/or one or more inductances. 3. Elastic sleeve according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the plurality of discrete impedance elements (60) comprises a plurality of capacitors, and wherein a respective resistor is electrically connected in parallel to at least one of the plurality of capacitors. 4. Elastic sleeve (1 , 4) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the plurality of discrete impedance elements is arranged in a straight chain or in a Z-shaped chain. 5. Elastic sleeve (2, 3) according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising a shielding layer (200), arranged around the plurality of discrete impedance elements. 6. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the plurality of discrete impedance elements is arranged on a flexible printed circuit board (52, 53). 7. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the divider assembly comprises an encapsulation body (150), in which the plurality of discrete impedance elements is encapsulated. 8. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the divider assembly is removable from the cavity. 9. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising e) a high-voltage contact (80, 82) for electrical connection of a first discrete impedance element (60) of the plurality of discrete impedance elements to an inner conductor (250) of the power conductor (210), and/or f) a low-voltage contact (130) for electrical connection of a second discrete impedance element (60) of the plurality of discrete impedance elements to electrical ground, accessible from outside the elastic sleeve. 10. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the cavity has an elongated shape and extends longitudinally in a first direction, and wherein the receiving space has an elongated shape and extends longitudinally in a second direction, and wherein the first direction is parallel to 

 the second direction within an angle of +/- 10Â°. 1 1 . Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, further comprising an electrically insulating voidfilling material (300), arranged in the cavity, wherein the voidfilling material is arranged between at least a portion of the divider assembly and at least a portion of the cavity wall such as to fill a space between the divider assembly and the cavity wall. 12. Elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the voidfilling material consists of a mastic or a gel, in particular a silicone gel. 13. Power network comprising a HV/MV power conductor insulated by an elastic sleeve according to any one of the preceding claims. 14. Kit of parts for being assembled to form an elastic sleeve (1 , 2, 3, 4) according to any one of claims 1 to 12, comprising a) an elastic sleeve body (10) for electrically insulating a HV/MV power conductor (210) in a power network, the sleeve body being radially shrinkable around the power conductor or radially expandable when pushed over the power conductor, the sleeve body comprising - a receiving space (20) for receiving a section of the power conductor such that the sleeve body surrounds the power conductor; - a cavity (30, 32) formed in the sleeve body and delimited by a cavity wall (190, 290) formed by a portion of the sleeve body; b) a divider assembly (40, 41 , 42, 43, 44) comprising a plurality of discrete impedance elements (60) of which at least two of said impedance elements are electrically connected in series such as to be operable as a voltage divider for sensing a voltage of the power conductor, wherein the divider assembly is arrangeable in the cavity. 15. Kit of parts according to the preceding claim, wherein the plurality of discrete impedance elements (60) comprises a plurality of capacitors, and wherein a respective resistor is electrically connected in parallel to at least one of the plurality of capacitors. 16. Kit of parts according to the preceding claim, further comprising c) an electrically insulating voidfilling material (300), adapted for being arranged in the cavity (30, 32) such that the voidfilling material is arranged between at least a portion of the divider assembly (40, 41 , 42, 43, 44) and at least a portion of the cavity wall (190, 290) such as to fill a space between the divider assembly and the cavity wall. 17. Elbow plug (310) or cable splicing device or termination or separable connector for use with a MV/HV cable (210), comprising an elastic sleeve (1 , 2, 3, 4) according to any one of claims 1 to 12. 18. Method of applying an elastic sleeve (1 , 2, 3, 4) on a MV/HV power conductor (210), e.g. on a MV/HV cable, the method comprising the following steps, in any sequence: a) providing a kit of parts according to claim 14 and providing a MV/HV power conductor (210); b) arranging a section of the power conductor in the receiving space (20) of the sleeve body (10); c) arranging the divider assembly (40, 41 , 42, 43, 44) in the cavity (30, 32) of the sleeve body.
